creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
This will record the selected OPTIONS from the port build into the resulting +CONTENTS in /var/db/pkg.

	pkgng is already doing this itself. This patch will allow pkg_install to support OPTIONS recording as well.

	The main goal of this is to assist port building tools such as poudriere, portmaster, and portupgrade. By knowing what options were selected at compile-time, they can be smarter about when a needed force-rebuild is needed.

	This is implemented in poudriere for both pkgng and pkg_install support. See http://fossil.etoilebsd.net/poudriere/ci/98426527c8?sbs=0 for a usage example.

	Discussion and more information @ http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2012-August/077291.html
